{
  "analysis": "The attack recovered None. I need to debug by tracing internal states. Let me write a debug script to verify the round-by-round state and my understanding of the cipher structure.",
  "plan": "Write and run a debug script to trace the encryption internals and verify the differential propagation.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/debug.py << 'EOF'
import feal, random
random.seed(42)
feal.create_random_keys()
print("Keys:", [hex(k) for k in feal.key])

def trace(label, p):
    L, R = feal.getleft(p), feal.getright(p)
    print(f"  {label}: P_L={L:#010x} P_R={R:#010x}")
    L ^= feal.key[0]; R ^= feal.key[1]
    R ^= L
    for i in range(4):
        mixed = feal.f_function(R ^ feal.key[i+2])
        L, R = R, L ^ mixed
        print(f"    Round {i}: L={L:#010x} R={R:#010x}")
    L ^= R
    c = feal.merge(R, L)
    print(f"    Cipher: getleft={R:#010x} getright={L:#010x}")
    return c

delta = (0x80800000 << 32) | 0x80800000
p1 = random.randint(0, (1<<64)-1)
p2 = p1 ^ delta
c1 = trace("P1", p1)
c2 = trace("P2", p2)
print(f"\nDelta P: {delta:#018x}")
print(f"getleft(c1)={feal.getleft(c1):#010x} getleft(c2)={feal.getleft(c2):#010x}")
print(f"getright(c1)={feal.getright(c1):#010x} getright(c2)={feal.getright(c2):#010x}")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 /app/debug.py
",
      "duration": 2.0
    }
  ]
}
